summary: Epic v1.3.0 session (10h): SVG pips, mechanical enforcement gates (_modulesRead, per-turn verify, action card stat/DC, hand-written widget detection, d20 stat completeness), POI budget, level-up panel, dice widget preamble/aliases, UI/UX fixes, 8-agent pre-shipping review with all findings fixed, station.css cleanup, tag setup apply command, action card markers, brief text placeholder. Pre-skill widget analysis identified 7 transferable improvements. Tests 1087→1153.

tasks.content: All handover tasks from previous session
tag setup apply command — one-command game init
Per-turn verify gate, hand-written widget detection, d20 stat gate
Station.css duplicate cleanup, action card markers, brief text placeholder

Inline narrative CSS classes (.hl, .dlg, .snd, .wr, .lore) — add to common-css.ts + all theme files + craftGuidance. Semantic inline highlighting for prose: cyan=items/tech, green=characters, blue-italic=dialogue, amber-uppercase=sound, red=danger, purple=lore. Must work across all 13 styles.

Action buttons with description + skill check tag — update action card HTML pattern in craftGuidance to include .act-desc (grey description line) and .act-check (amber check type indicator like 'CHA CHECK'). No DC revealed.
Multi-phase progressive reveal — extend scene.ts from 1 Continue phase to support N phases with phase-specific Continue buttons. GM composes narrative in phases for pacing within a single widget.
Quest/lore discovery banners — styled toast/banner CSS for 'QUEST UNLOCKED' and 'CODEX UPDATED' events. Evidence card pattern with coloured left borders.
XP toast animation — trigger showToast with XP gain amount when state changes. Bounce/pop animation for immediate feedback.
Split render.spec.ts — 968 lines, 32 from hard limit
CDN_BASE hardcodes @feature/tag-cli-v1.3.0 — update to @main at merge
Font-family fallbacks in panel inline CSS — monospace fallback shows when CDN CSS hasn't loaded yet
Audio: implement 4 missing soundscapes (heartbeat, station-ambience, underwater, fire)

next_steps: HIGH: Add inline narrative CSS classes to common-css.ts + all 13 style files. Classes: .nar-item (cyan), .nar-npc (green), .nar-dlg (blue italic), .nar-sfx (amber uppercase), .nar-danger (red), .nar-lore (purple). Update craftGuidance.compositionNotes with the class vocabulary.
HIGH: Update action card pattern — add description line and optional skill check tag. Pattern:
HIGH: Multi-phase reveal — extend scene skeleton to support <!-- [PHASE 2] --> markers that create additional Continue buttons for GM-paced narrative unfolding.
HIGH: Split render.spec.ts before it bricks.
MEDIUM: Quest/lore discovery banners and evidence cards — CSS in common-css.ts, triggered by GM composition.

context.test_results: 1,153 tests passing across 67 files. Zero failures.
context.pre_skill_analysis: Pre-skill widget (back_office_chip_reveal.html) identified 7 improvements: inline narrative classes, action button descriptions+check tags, multi-phase reveal, quest banners, evidence cards, XP toast, TTS narration. The inline classes and action descriptions are highest impact. All improvements should be transferable across all 13 visual styles since they use --ta-* contract variables.
context.transferability: Yes — inline narrative classes use semantic --ta-* variables (--ta-color-accent for items, --ta-color-success for NPCs, --ta-color-info for dialogue, --ta-color-warning for sounds, --ta-color-danger for threats, --ta-color-conviction for lore). These are already mapped in every style's bridge block. The CSS classes go in common-css.ts which is shared across all templates.
context.review_status: 8-agent review completed. All Critical/High fixed. Station.css cleaned (162 lines removed). VALID_TOP_KEYS, batch handler, dnd_5e, as-any, interface→type all resolved.
context.known_limitations: render.spec.ts at 968 lines. verify.ts at 601 lines. CDN_BASE hardcodes feature branch. 4 new verify checks lack negative tests (now written). Font-family race condition on panel open before CDN loads.
